testcase.name: testLogin_Success
testcase.system-out: 12:19:36.756 [main] INFO com.rental.service.AuthService -- Attempting login for user: test@example.com 12:19:36.761 [main] INFO com.rental.service.AuthService -- User test@example.com logged in successfully

testcase.name: testLogin_UserNotFound
testcase.system-out: 12:19:36.785 [main] INFO com.rental.service.AuthService -- Attempting login for user: notfound@example.com 12:19:36.786 [main] ERROR com.rental.service.AuthService -- Login failed: User notfound@example.com not found
